system.description:
Discipline: Dianxue
Skill: Arm Strike at a -1d10 penalty Against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

Your hands move in a dazzling blur as you press a complicated series of accupoints on the victim. Then pressing palm flat against the flesh, you permanently alter the flow of Qi through their meridian points, doing almost irreversible harm to their vital energies. This also leaves a dull red outline of your hand. This is a lost Technique known only to the Phoenix clan. They have vanished and according to rumor it is still found in one of their old manuals. It can only be performed Cathartically. Requirements: This Technique requires three Ranks in the Medicine Skill. Cathartic: This Attack is made a -1d10 penalty, and you cannot do anything else in the round that you make this strike. On a Success, the victim perma nently loses 2 points per Rank of Dianxue from Hardiness and all Physical Skills. In addition, the victim takes normal Damage plus 4 Extra Wounds. On a Total Success, an additional point is drained and an Extra Wound suffered. This Attack may not be performed multiple times on the same target. The Ranks drained by this Attack do not recover at the normal rate, and can only be returned through the use of a Kung Fu Technique or a suitably powerful supernatural being. This Technique can also be used to reverse the effects of Phoenix Palm.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticTotalSuccessTargetDrains: defense.hardiness=2 per Rank of Dianxue; defense.hardiness=1
system.targetDrainsNote: Also permanently drains all Physical Skills by the same base amount. This drain does not recover normally and can only be returned by suitable powerful aid.
